---
id: create-organization-invitation
title: "Create an organization invitation"
description: "Invites a member to the active organization. The caller must be an org admin."
sidebar_label: "Create an organization invitation"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create an organization invitation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/invitations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Invites a member to the active organization. The caller must be an org admin.
